title: MCBrowser
description: A client-sided internet browser for block game.
body:
This is a mod that adds an internet browser to minecraft.

This has a couple of features (More to come of course) like opening the in-game browser when you open a link.

now you can access the store on your favorite server

![A player opening the browser after clicking a link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1c7kQCx6/images/dfb2da72b0fbfa3a42c42bb1dc246b3209290477.gif)

or claim your daily reward on hypixel.

![A user claiming their daily reward on hypixel using the browser](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/1c7kQCx6/images/5f191be1ff16ff9957433bef106d5826506c31c1.png)


Requires [MCEF](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcef) and [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)

[If downloading MCEF for version 1.21.10 click here](https://modrinth.com/mod/mcef-keksuccino)

NOTICE: The developers of this mod (aka Myself) are not responsible for any sus or illegal things you come across while using MCBrowser. Use this mod at your own risk. 

Use the command `/browser` or `/br` to open the browser in-game
